title: SafeKeepingInstructionTypeValues
description: A request to change the level of protection applied to assets, such as moving from standard to high-security custody.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Deposit Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to place an asset or security into safe keeping for custody or protection.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Withdrawal Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to remove an asset from safe keeping, subject to authorization and agreement terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transfer Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to move assets between custodial accounts, locations, or owners while maintaining security.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Release Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to authorize the release of an asset to the owner or a designated party, often requiring single, dual, or agreement-based authorization.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Segregation Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to hold assets separately to ensure restricted access or enhanced protection (e.g., segregated custody).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Inventory or Audit Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to perform inspection, verification, or reporting of held assets.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Safe Keeping Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to perform periodic actions on assets (e.g., move, audit, or reconcile) according to a defined schedule.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Custody Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to hold collateral assets under safe keeping arrangements for secured transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Recall Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to retrieve an asset from custody due to maturity, settlement, or change in agreement terms.
